The '''Department of Cost Accounting''' was a government organization within the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], most likely part of the [[Ministry of Finance (Galactic Republic)|Ministry of Finance]]. [[Joram Kithe]] worked there as an accountant in a job he got due to the influence of his aunt [[Tagdel]], who had a position in the Ministry of Finance.

==Appearances==
*{{InsiderCite|65|The Pengalan Tradeoff|reprint=1}} {{Mo}}
